title: cephalophyllum maritimum
intro: Cephalophyllum maritimum, also known as the sea succulent or beach succulent, is a succulent plant species that is native to the coastal regions of South Africa. Traditionally, Cephalophyllum maritimum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cephalophyllum maritimum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Cephalophyllum maritimum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
